name: Ectoin
description: A naturally produced extremophile molecule that shields skin cells from UV damage, pollution, and dryness.
scientificSummary: Produced by halophilic bacteria as a stress protectant, ectoin creates a hydration shell around proteins and cell membranes.
mechanismOfAction: Forms a stable water-molecule cage around biomolecules, preventing denaturation from UV radiation, heat, and chemical stress.

seo.title: Ectoin - Extremophile Skin Protection Molecule | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Ectoin protects skin from UV damage, pollution, and dehydration at the cellular level.
